Coverage of the quarter-final second-leg tie from Allianz Arena, as the two European giants go head to head for a place in the semi-finals. Madrid have won this competition a record 15 times and have triumphed in the final on eight occasions this century. Bayern have had plenty of success in this tournament as well having lifted the trophy six times, last winning the title in the Covid-hit 2019/20 season.
